The '''assault on Dalron IV''' took place during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. The battle was fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] civilians. During the engagement, a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] bombardment caused a freak malfunction that cut of communications to [[Davaire Colmar]]'s [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Land assault trooper|assault trooper]] unit from the [[Imperial Special Training Corps/Legends|Imperial Special Training Corps]]. A mob of citizens 2,000 strong attacked the elite army unit with odds of 50-to-1 and overwhelmed them. Colmar suffered a severe head wound and was left to die. Coming again to consciousness, Colmar wandered aimlessly across the landscape, contemplating the battle and the direction his life had taken. Realizing how the Empire had failed to protect its own people, he defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].
